kickoff_budget_note: This thread finished within the low-risk 8-task cap; no sprint-mode 10-task allowance or high-risk 4-task budget was used.
scope_goal: Build the FTS-first retrieval MVP with deterministic excerpt and provenance output for engine generation flows, aligned to ROADMAP.md Milestone 3: Real workflow loop and PRODUCT_VISION.md capability 2.
scope_completed: Reviewed code commits f8a32d372301be4a7c67b97a66ddc8e04f36011f, c7ca5bcdb3a1b829712c4b3d2f3a39e2bd26c14f, 98ec3f4c0f475308b3ebb528551de923cba549ad, 1c01a74b58888f408e9fa1134a10a29478c6f39a, cc16c21692b7ca4af9e7866a659b45fc18b87f63, and 23e4e4273b8808f5cc5a2f9adab1a7eb2d821b75 keep SQLite FTS authoritative, export the canonical retrieval query constructor through both facades, normalize retrieval payload snapshots, and normalize excerpt fallback rehydration so excerpt and provenance bundles stay deterministic.
tasks_completed: Added FTS provenance retrieval bundles and retrieval service support for deterministic excerpt/provenance output.
Exported the canonical retrieval query constructor through the engine and package facades.
Enforced FTS-only hit strategies while keeping PageIndex and embeddings fallback-only.
Normalized downstream retrieval payload snapshots so tuple-shaped query and policy data rehydrates deterministically.
Normalized excerpt fallback rehydration so deterministic excerpt output survives the payload snapshot path.
